expectations.text: 主訴區塊完整，保留右側太陽穴、月經週期等描述
expectations.evidence: ## 主訴 present with all details including right temple and menstrual aggravation

expectations.text: 診斷區塊含肝血不足和肝陽上亢
expectations.evidence: ## 診斷 with 肝血不足，肝陽上亢 and pathomechanism explanation

expectations.text: 處方保留所有藥名劑量（天麻15g、鉤藤12g後下等）
expectations.evidence: All 11 herbs listed with dosages and special notes (後下/先煎)
## 追蹤重點 with 6 monitoring items including warning signs
## 疑問思考 with 4 clinical reflection questions
Ends with '這樣的整理有沒有需要補充或調整的地方？'
